mapper.select: select ifnull(sum(total_amount), 0) from wms_sale_order where status = 'audited'
select ifnull(sum(amount_due), 0) from fin_receivable
select ifnull(sum(amount), 0) from fin_receipt
select count(1) from fin_receivable where status != 'paid' and due_date is not null and due_date < sysdate()
select count(1) from wms_stock where (warning_min_qty is not null and quantity < warning_min_qty) or (warning_max_qty is not null and quantity > warning_max_qty)

select date_format(sale_date, '%y-%m-%d') as date, amount from ( select date(ifnull(audit_time, create_time)) as sale_date, ifnull(sum(total_amount), 0) as amount from wms_sale_order where status = 'audited' group by date(ifnull(audit_time, create_time)) order by sale_date desc limit 7 ) recent_sale_trend order by sale_date asc

select ifnull(c.customer_name, concat('客户', cast(o.customer_id as char))) as customer, ifnull(sum(o.total_amount), 0) as amount from wms_sale_order o left join md_customer c on o.customer_id = c.customer_id where o.status = 'audited' group by o.customer_id, c.customer_name order by amount desc limit 5
select count(1) from wms_sale_order where status = 'submitted'
select count(1) from wms_inbound where status = 'submitted'
select count(1) from wms_outbound where status = 'submitted'

select cast(notice_id as char) as message_id, notice_title as message_title, notice_content as message_content, create_time as message_time, 'notice' as message_type from sys_notice where status = '0' order by notice_id desc limit 5

select cast(message_id as char) as message_id, message_title, message_content, create_time as message_time, message_type, message_level, business_type, cast(business_id as char) as business_id from biz_message where status = '0' and message_type = 'stock_warning' order by message_id desc limit 5

select cast(fr.receivable_id as char) as message_id, concat('应收到期提醒：', ifnull(so.order_no, concat('历史销售单id：', cast(fr.sale_order_id as char)))) as message_title, fr.due_date as message_time, concat('销售单号：', ifnull(so.order_no, concat('历史销售单id：', cast(fr.sale_order_id as char))), '，客户：', ifnull(mc.customer_name, concat('历史客户id：', cast(fr.customer_id as char))), '，预计到期：', date_format(fr.due_date, '%Y-%m-%d')) as message_content, 'receivable' as message_type, 'sale_order' as business_type, cast(fr.sale_order_id as char) as business_id from fin_receivable fr left join wms_sale_order so on fr.sale_order_id = so.sale_order_id left join md_customer mc on fr.customer_id = mc.customer_id where fr.status in ('unpaid', 'partial') and fr.due_date is not null order by fr.due_date asc limit 5

select cast(message_id as char) as message_id, message_title, message_content, create_time as message_time, message_type, message_level, business_type, cast(business_id as char) as business_id from biz_message where status = '0' and message_type = 'sale_order_audit' order by message_id desc limit 5

select ifnull(p.category_name, '未分类') as categoryName, ifnull(sum(i.amount), 0) as amount from wms_sale_order_item i join wms_sale_order o on i.sale_order_id = o.sale_order_id left join md_product p on i.product_id = p.product_id where o.status = 'audited' group by ifnull(p.category_name, '未分类') order by amount desc

select o.order_no as orderNo, ifnull(o.audit_time, o.create_time) as saleDate, c.customer_name as customerName, p.product_code as productCode, p.product_name as productName, p.category_name as categoryName, i.quantity as quantity, i.price as price, i.amount as amount from wms_sale_order_item i join wms_sale_order o on i.sale_order_id = o.sale_order_id left join md_customer c on o.customer_id = c.customer_id left join md_product p on i.product_id = p.product_id
o.status = 'audited'
and ifnull(o.audit_time, o.create_time) >= concat(#{startDate}, ' 00:00:00')
and ifnull(o.audit_time, o.create_time) < date_add(concat(#{endDate}, ' 00:00:00'), interval 1 day)
and o.customer_id = #{customerId}
and p.category_name like concat('%', #{categoryName}, '%')
and p.product_name like concat('%', #{productName}, '%')
order by ifnull(o.audit_time, o.create_time) desc

select 'receivable' as reconcileType, cast(fr.customer_id as char) as targetId, ifnull(mc.customer_name, concat('历史客户id：', cast(fr.customer_id as char))) as targetName, ifnull(sum(fr.amount_due), 0) as dueAmount, ifnull(sum(fr.amount_paid), 0) as paidAmount, ifnull(sum(ifnull(fr.amount_due, 0) - ifnull(fr.amount_paid, 0)), 0) as remainAmount from fin_receivable fr left join md_customer mc on fr.customer_id = mc.customer_id
fr.customer_id is not null
and mc.customer_name like concat('%', #{targetName}, '%')
group by fr.customer_id, mc.customer_name union all select 'payable' as reconcileType, cast(fp.supplier_id as char) as targetId, ifnull(ms.supplier_name, concat('历史供应商id：', cast(fp.supplier_id as char))) as targetName, ifnull(sum(fp.amount_due), 0) as dueAmount, ifnull(sum(fp.amount_paid), 0) as paidAmount, ifnull(sum(fp.remain_amount), 0) as remainAmount from fin_payable fp left join md_supplier ms on fp.supplier_id = ms.supplier_id
fp.supplier_id is not null
and ms.supplier_name like concat('%', #{targetName}, '%')
group by fp.supplier_id, ms.supplier_name

select 'sale_invoice' as invoiceType, so.order_no as sourceNo, ifnull(so.total_amount, 0) as invoiceAmount, round(ifnull(so.total_amount, 0) / 1.13, 2) as amountWithoutTax, round(ifnull(so.total_amount, 0) - ifnull(so.total_amount, 0) / 1.13, 2) as taxAmount, ifnull(so.audit_time, so.create_time) as billTime from wms_sale_order so
so.status = 'audited'
and ifnull(so.audit_time, so.create_time) >= concat(#{startDate}, ' 00:00:00')
and ifnull(so.audit_time, so.create_time) < date_add(concat(#{endDate}, ' 00:00:00'), interval 1 day)
union all select 'purchase_invoice' as invoiceType, po.order_no as sourceNo, ifnull(po.total_amount, 0) as invoiceAmount, round(ifnull(po.total_amount, 0) / 1.13, 2) as amountWithoutTax, round(ifnull(po.total_amount, 0) - ifnull(po.total_amount, 0) / 1.13, 2) as taxAmount, ifnull(po.purchase_date, po.create_time) as billTime from wms_purchase_order po
po.status in ('1', '2', '3')
and ifnull(po.purchase_date, po.create_time) >= concat(#{startDate}, ' 00:00:00')
and ifnull(po.purchase_date, po.create_time) < date_add(concat(#{endDate}, ' 00:00:00'), interval 1 day)
order by billTime desc

select ifnull(( select sum(ifnull(fr.amount_due, 0) - ifnull(fr.amount_paid, 0)) from fin_receivable fr where fr.status in ('unpaid', 'partial') and fr.due_date is not null and fr.due_date <= date_add(curdate(), interval #{forecastDays} day) ), 0) as receivableAmount, ifnull(( select sum(fp.remain_amount) from fin_payable fp where fp.status in ('0', '1') and fp.due_date is not null and fp.due_date <= date_add(curdate(), interval #{forecastDays} day) ), 0) as payableAmount

select ifnull(( select sum(ifnull(fr.amount_due, 0) - ifnull(fr.amount_paid, 0)) from fin_receivable fr where fr.status in ('unpaid', 'partial') and fr.due_date is not null and fr.due_date < curdate() ), 0) as overdueReceivableAmount, ifnull(( select sum(ifnull(fp.remain_amount, 0)) from fin_payable fp where fp.status in ('0', '1') and fp.due_date is not null and fp.due_date <= date_add(curdate(), interval #{payableRiskDays} day) ), 0) as dueSoonPayableAmount, ifnull(( select count(1) from fin_receivable fr where fr.status in ('unpaid', 'partial') and fr.due_date is not null and datediff(curdate(), date(fr.due_date)) > 60 ), 0) as longOverdueReceivableCount, ifnull(( select count(1) from wms_sale_order so where so.status = 'submitted' and so.create_time is not null and so.create_time < date_sub(now(), interval 3 day) ), 0) + ifnull(( select count(1) from wms_inbound wi where wi.status = 'submitted' and wi.create_time is not null and wi.create_time < date_sub(now(), interval 3 day) ), 0) + ifnull(( select count(1) from wms_outbound wo where wo.status = 'submitted' and wo.create_time is not null and wo.create_time < date_sub(now(), interval 3 day) ), 0) + ifnull(( select count(1) from wms_purchase_order po where po.status = '0' and po.create_time is not null and po.create_time < date_sub(now(), interval 3 day) ), 0) as pendingApprovalTimeoutCount

select '未设置到期日' as bucketName, 0 as sortOrder, ifnull(sum(ifnull(fr.amount_due, 0) - ifnull(fr.amount_paid, 0)), 0) as amount, count(1) as recordCount from fin_receivable fr where fr.status in ('unpaid', 'partial') and fr.due_date is null union all select '未到期' as bucketName, 1 as sortOrder, ifnull(sum(ifnull(fr.amount_due, 0) - ifnull(fr.amount_paid, 0)), 0) as amount, count(1) as recordCount from fin_receivable fr where fr.status in ('unpaid', 'partial') and fr.due_date is not null and date(fr.due_date) >= curdate() union all select '逾期1-30天' as bucketName, 2 as sortOrder, ifnull(sum(ifnull(fr.amount_due, 0) - ifnull(fr.amount_paid, 0)), 0) as amount, count(1) as recordCount from fin_receivable fr where fr.status in ('unpaid', 'partial') and fr.due_date is not null and datediff(curdate(), date(fr.due_date)) between 1 and 30 union all select '逾期31-60天' as bucketName, 3 as sortOrder, ifnull(sum(ifnull(fr.amount_due, 0) - ifnull(fr.amount_paid, 0)), 0) as amount, count(1) as recordCount from fin_receivable fr where fr.status in ('unpaid', 'partial') and fr.due_date is not null and datediff(curdate(), date(fr.due_date)) between 31 and 60 union all select '逾期61天以上' as bucketName, 4 as sortOrder, ifnull(sum(ifnull(fr.amount_due, 0) - ifnull(fr.amount_paid, 0)), 0) as amount, count(1) as recordCount from fin_receivable fr where fr.status in ('unpaid', 'partial') and fr.due_date is not null and datediff(curdate(), date(fr.due_date)) >= 61 order by sortOrder asc

select '未设置到期日' as bucketName, 0 as sortOrder, ifnull(sum(ifnull(fp.remain_amount, 0)), 0) as amount, count(1) as recordCount from fin_payable fp where fp.status in ('0', '1') and fp.due_date is null union all select '未到期' as bucketName, 1 as sortOrder, ifnull(sum(ifnull(fp.remain_amount, 0)), 0) as amount, count(1) as recordCount from fin_payable fp where fp.status in ('0', '1') and fp.due_date is not null and date(fp.due_date) >= curdate() union all select '逾期1-30天' as bucketName, 2 as sortOrder, ifnull(sum(ifnull(fp.remain_amount, 0)), 0) as amount, count(1) as recordCount from fin_payable fp where fp.status in ('0', '1') and fp.due_date is not null and datediff(curdate(), date(fp.due_date)) between 1 and 30 union all select '逾期31-60天' as bucketName, 3 as sortOrder, ifnull(sum(ifnull(fp.remain_amount, 0)), 0) as amount, count(1) as recordCount from fin_payable fp where fp.status in ('0', '1') and fp.due_date is not null and datediff(curdate(), date(fp.due_date)) between 31 and 60 union all select '逾期61天以上' as bucketName, 4 as sortOrder, ifnull(sum(ifnull(fp.remain_amount, 0)), 0) as amount, count(1) as recordCount from fin_payable fp where fp.status in ('0', '1') and fp.due_date is not null and datediff(curdate(), date(fp.due_date)) >= 61 order by sortOrder asc

select cast(fr.customer_id as char) as targetId, ifnull(mc.customer_name, concat('历史客户id：', cast(fr.customer_id as char))) as targetName, ifnull(sum(ifnull(fr.amount_due, 0) - ifnull(fr.amount_paid, 0)), 0) as remainAmount, max(datediff(curdate(), date(fr.due_date))) as overdueDays, count(1) as recordCount from fin_receivable fr left join md_customer mc on fr.customer_id = mc.customer_id where fr.status in ('unpaid', 'partial') and fr.due_date is not null and fr.due_date < curdate() group by fr.customer_id, mc.customer_name order by remainAmount desc, overdueDays desc limit 5

select cast(fp.supplier_id as char) as targetId, ifnull(ms.supplier_name, concat('历史供应商id：', cast(fp.supplier_id as char))) as targetName, ifnull(sum(ifnull(fp.remain_amount, 0)), 0) as remainAmount, min(datediff(date(fp.due_date), curdate())) as dueInDays, count(1) as recordCount from fin_payable fp left join md_supplier ms on fp.supplier_id = ms.supplier_id where fp.status in ('0', '1') and fp.due_date is not null and fp.due_date <= date_add(curdate(), interval #{payableRiskDays} day) group by fp.supplier_id, ms.supplier_name order by dueInDays asc, remainAmount desc limit 5
